# Special Characters and Symbols Test

## Scientific Symbols
The operating temperature is -50 to 120 °C.
Value: ±0.001 µm
Formula: E=mc²

## Currencies
Budget: $1.2M, €1.1M, £0.9M, ¥180M, ₹100M

## Symbols
© 2026 Antigravity Corp.
All rights reserved ®.
Trade Mark ™.

## Unicode Emojis
🚀 Rocket to the moon!
🌌 Exploring the galaxy.
🧪 Chemical formulas.
⚡ High voltage.
🛡️ Security shield.

## Edge Cases
Empty line follows:

Line with leading spaces:    Indented line.
Line with trailing spaces: Line with spaces    
Multiple newlines:


End of document.
